creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
Please close this trouble report. That problem has been resolved in the
 Wine sources.
 
 (On -STABLE and -CURRENT Wine will fail due to a different problem, but
 that is due to a bug in ncurses which hopefully will be resolved soon;
 I already alerted hackers@freebsd.org.)
 
 Gerald
 -- 
 Gerald "Jerry" pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at http://www.dbai.tuwien.ac.at/~pfeifer/
